name: axiomancer-mechanics
description: Turn-based RPG combat mechanics with philosophical themes

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run type-check
scripts.dev: echo Please use check 'package.json' or README.md for available commands...
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.publish:patch: npm run type-check && npm test && npm version patch && npm publish
scripts.publish:minor: npm run type-check && npm test && npm version minor && npm publish
scripts.publish:major: npm run type-check && npm test && npm version major && npm publish
scripts.start: echo Please use check 'package.json' or README.md for available commands...
scripts.verify: npm run type-check && npm test && npm run build
